entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`game_summary_id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `external_key` TEXT NOT NULL, `pool` TEXT NOT NULL, `pool_size` INTEGER NOT NULL, `code_length` INTEGER NOT NULL, `started` INTEGER NOT NULL, `guess_count` INTEGER NOT NULL, `solved` INTEGER NOT NULL, `last_played` INTEGER, `exact_matches` INTEGER NOT NULL, `near_matches` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_game_summary_external_key
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_game_summary_external_key` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`external_key`)

indices.name: index_game_summary_solved_started_last_played
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_game_summary_solved_started_last_played` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`solved`, `started`, `last_played`)

indices.name: index_game_summary_solved_pool_size_code_length_guess_count_last_played_started
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_game_summary_solved_pool_size_code_length_guess_count_last_played_started` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`solved`, `pool_size`, `code_length`, `guess_count`, `last_played`, `started`)
